summary: Completed testing of PDF Compliance Summary Export and Back Button Navigation features. Fixed a bug in PDF generation (duplicate style name). All 6 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests verified PDF download, print options, tab persistence, and filter persistence.
passed_tests: GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-pdf - Returns valid PDF with correct headers
GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-pdf - Filename contains employee code and date
GET /api/employees/{id}/export-compliance-summary - Returns JSON with compliance data
UI: Download Compliance PDF button visible in Actions dropdown
UI: Print Compliance PDF button visible in Actions dropdown
UI: PDF download triggers file download with correct filename
UI: Tab persistence - Employee profile tab selection persists in URL (?tab=documents)
UI: Tab persistence - Compliance Centre tab selection persists in URL (?tab=insurance)
UI: Filter persistence - Employees page filter persists in URL (?onboarding=New)
UI: Back button navigation works using browser history

bugs_fixed.issue: PDF generation failed with KeyError: Style 'BodyText' already defined in stylesheet
bugs_fixed.fix: Renamed custom style from 'BodyText' to 'ComplianceBodyText' to avoid conflict with default stylesheet

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed duplicate style name in PDF generation
seed_data_creation: Used existing employees in system for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF Compliance Summary Export fully functional. Download button triggers PDF download, Print button opens PDF in new tab. Tab persistence works for both Employee Profile and Compliance Centre pages using URL search params. Filter persistence works on Employees page. Back button uses navigate(-1) for browser history navigation.

pdf_export.download_button: Present in Actions dropdown with data-testid='download-compliance-pdf-btn'
pdf_export.print_button: Present in Actions dropdown with data-testid='print-compliance-pdf-btn'
pdf_export.pdf_content: Professional A4 PDF with employee info, compliance score, checklist, training summary

tab_persistence.employee_profile: URL param ?tab={tabname} (overview, forms, checklist, documents, policies, training, audit)
